primary_goal: Scale new customer acquisition while maintaining sustainable ROAS
product_focus_q3: Summer Glow Bundle (Vitamin C + SPF + HA Serum)
compliance_notes: Retinol usage at night; include sensitivity disclaimer
SPF claims limited to broad-spectrum, water-resistant where applicable

tracking_status_summary.details_source: See input/website_events.json for QA and event volumes

past_learnings: Advantage+ Shopping produced stable ROAS when fed diverse creatives
DPA retargeting drives highest ROAS but saturates at frequency > 3.5
constraints: UK traffic has lower server-side AddToCart capture; CMP impact
notes_for_media_buyer: Prioritize Advantage+ Shopping for catalog scaling, add 1% LTV lookalikes for prospecting control, and keep retargeting windows tight with exclusions for recent converters. Refresh creatives every 2 weeks to manage frequency and fatigue.
